name: outreach-review-notify
description: Finds drafted outreach items needing human review and posts Slack notifications with quick-action buttons. T27 adds GET /webhook/render-approval-form (this commit); T28 adds POST /webhook/submit-approval with atomic CTE write and save_for_later no-op. TODO(phase2): migrate notification log from outcomes to a dedicated notifications table. NOTE: Slack channel C0B4SUTP8R4 (#plotlens-outreach) is hardcoded because n8n 2.9.4 blocks $env access in node expressions (N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE default). To change the channel, update the Slack Notify node's channelId.value directly. T29 adds POST /webhook/slack-interactive for Slack Block Kit button clicks (Approve/Reject). SYSTEMD REQUIREMENT: /etc/systemd/system/n8n.service.d/slack-env.conf must set SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET=<from Infisical SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET> and N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE=false for signature verification to work.

parameters.query:
SELECT oi.id AS outreach_item_id, oi.source_url, oi.source_platform,
       d.id AS preview_draft_id, d.draft_text AS preview_text, d.risk_score AS preview_risk_score
FROM outreach_items oi
JOIN drafts d ON d.outreach_item_id = oi.id AND d.variant = 'helpful_only'
WHERE oi.status='drafted'
  AND d.status='needs_human_review'
  AND oi.id NOT IN (
    SELECT (notes::jsonb->>'outreach_item_id')::bigint
    FROM outcomes
    WHERE notes::jsonb ? 'outreach_item_id' AND notes::jsonb->>'kind' = 'notified'
  )
ORDER BY oi.discovered_at
LIMIT 5;

INSERT INTO outcomes (publish_job_id, notes)
VALUES (NULL, jsonb_build_object('outreach_item_id', $1::bigint, 'kind', 'notified')::text);

WITH drafts_cte AS (
  SELECT d.id, d.variant, d.draft_text, d.risk_score, d.suggested_destination, d.suggested_post_type,
         oi.source_url, oi.source_platform, oi.id AS outreach_item_id
  FROM drafts d
  JOIN outreach_items oi ON oi.id = d.outreach_item_id
  WHERE oi.id = $1::bigint
    AND d.status = 'needs_human_review'
  ORDER BY d.variant
)
SELECT * FROM drafts_cte
UNION ALL
SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM drafts_cte);

WITH ins AS (
  INSERT INTO approvals (draft_id, approved_by, decision, edited_text, approved_destination, approved_post_type, approved_content_hash, approval_notes, approved_platform)
  VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $10)
  RETURNING id, draft_id, decision, approved_destination, approved_content_hash, approved_platform
),
upd1 AS (
  UPDATE drafts SET status = CASE
    WHEN $3::text = 'approved' THEN 'approved'
    WHEN $3::text = 'manual_only' THEN 'approved'
    WHEN $3::text = 'rejected' THEN 'rejected'
    ELSE status
  END
  WHERE id = (SELECT draft_id FROM ins)
  RETURNING 1
),
upd2 AS (
  UPDATE drafts SET status='rejected'
  WHERE outreach_item_id = $9::bigint
    AND id <> (SELECT draft_id FROM ins)
    AND status = 'needs_human_review'
    AND $3::text IN ('approved','manual_only','rejected')
  RETURNING 1
),
upd3 AS (
  UPDATE outreach_items SET status='reviewed'
  WHERE id = $9::bigint
    AND $3::text IN ('approved','manual_only','rejected')
  RETURNING 1
),
pj AS (
  INSERT INTO publish_jobs (approval_id, destination_platform, destination_account, publish_mode, payload_hash, scheduled_for, status)
  SELECT
    ins.id,
    ins.approved_platform,
    ins.approved_destination,
    CASE
      WHEN $3::text = 'manual_only' THEN 'manual_required'
      WHEN $3::text = 'approved' THEN 'postiz_scheduled'
      ELSE NULL
    END,
    ins.approved_content_hash,
    NULL,
    'ready'
  FROM ins
  WHERE $3::text IN ('approved', 'manual_only')
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT id FROM ins;

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $('Build Approval').item.json.draft_id,
  $('Build Approval').item.json.approved_by,
  $('Build Approval').item.json.decision,
  $('Build Approval').item.json.edited_text,
  $('Build Approval').item.json.approved_destination,
  $('Build Approval').item.json.approved_post_type,
  $('Build Approval').item.json.approved_content_hash,
  $('Build Approval').item.json.approval_notes,
  $('Build Approval').item.json.outreach_item_id,
  $('Build Approval').item.json.approved_platform
] }}

parameters.responseBody:
={{ `

Saved for later

Outreach item #${$('Build Approval').item.json.outreach_item_id} kept in review queue.

Back to form

` }}

parameters.query:
SELECT d.id AS draft_id, d.risk_score, d.draft_text, d.content_hash, d.suggested_destination, d.suggested_post_type
FROM drafts d
WHERE d.outreach_item_id = $1::bigint
  AND d.variant = 'helpful_only'
  AND d.status = 'needs_human_review';

WITH ins AS (
  INSERT INTO approvals (draft_id, approved_by, decision, edited_text, approved_destination, approved_post_type, approved_content_hash, approval_notes, approved_platform)
  VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $10)
  RETURNING id, draft_id, decision, approved_destination, approved_content_hash, approved_platform
),
upd1 AS (
  UPDATE drafts SET status = CASE
    WHEN $3::text = 'approved' THEN 'approved'
    WHEN $3::text = 'rejected' THEN 'rejected'
    ELSE status
  END
  WHERE id = (SELECT draft_id FROM ins)
  RETURNING 1
),
upd2 AS (
  UPDATE drafts SET status='rejected'
  WHERE outreach_item_id = $9::bigint
    AND id <> (SELECT draft_id FROM ins)
    AND status = 'needs_human_review'
    AND $3::text IN ('approved','rejected')
  RETURNING 1
),
upd3 AS (
  UPDATE outreach_items SET status='reviewed'
  WHERE id = $9::bigint
    AND $3::text IN ('approved','rejected')
  RETURNING 1
),
pj AS (
  INSERT INTO publish_jobs (approval_id, destination_platform, destination_account, publish_mode, payload_hash, scheduled_for, status)
  SELECT ins.id, ins.approved_platform, ins.approved_destination, 'postiz_scheduled', ins.approved_content_hash, NULL, 'ready'
  FROM ins
  WHERE ins.decision = 'approved'
    AND ins.approved_destination IS NOT NULL
    AND length(ins.approved_destination) > 0
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT ins.id AS approval_id, (SELECT id FROM pj LIMIT 1) AS publish_job_id FROM ins;

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $('Build Slack Approval').item.json.draft_id,
  $('Build Slack Approval').item.json.approved_by,
  $('Build Slack Approval').item.json.decision,
  $('Build Slack Approval').item.json.edited_text,
  $('Build Slack Approval').item.json.approved_destination,
  $('Build Slack Approval').item.json.approved_post_type,
  $('Build Slack Approval').item.json.approved_content_hash,
  $('Build Slack Approval').item.json.approval_notes,
  $('Build Slack Approval').item.json.outreach_item_id,
  $('Build Slack Approval').item.json.approved_platform
] }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ replace_original: true, text: $('Build Slack Approval').item.json.decision === 'approved' ? ($json.publish_job_id ? ':white_check_mark: Approved by ' + $('Build Slack Approval').item.json.slack_user_name + ' → ' + $('Build Slack Approval').item.json.platform_label + ' — dispatching to Postiz (job #' + $json.publish_job_id + ')' : ':warning: Approved by ' + $('Build Slack Approval').item.json.slack_user_name + ' as triage-only — no destination set, use the form to dispatch') : ':x: Rejected by ' + $('Build Slack Approval').item.json.slack_user_name }) }}
{"replace_original": true, "text": ":warning: Risk score too high for quick-approve — please use the approval form"}
={{ JSON.stringify({ replace_original: false, text: ':x: ' + ($json.error_msg || 'No pending draft found for this item') }) }}
